title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: SpaceX上市首日股價飆升，助馬斯克成全球首位萬億富豪
summary: 根據彭博社富豪榜，馬斯克目前的身價為1.11萬億美元。SpaceX在納斯達克證券交易所上市，市值2.2萬億美元。

title: Amazon warning triggered US crackdown on Anthropic AI models: Reports
summary: Calls from Amazon CEO Andy Jassy and other tech firms prompted the Trump administration to suspend foreign access to Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models on Friday.

title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Pull Claude Fable, Mythos AI Models

title: Anthropic's Mythos AI finds no more 'serious' bugs in Zcash: Wilcox

title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
